title: Weekend Escape in Brno
description: Brno doesn't try to impress you — it just does. Ornate facades line tram-tracked streets, and beneath the city, a hidden world of vaulted cisterns and underground corridors waits in near-silence. It's the kind of place where you turn a corner and forget what century you're in.
coverAlt: Neo-Gothic building facade along a cobblestone street with tram lines in Brno's old town

images.alt: Ornate Neo-Gothic building facade on a sunlit street with tram tracks and pedestrians in Brno
images.caption: Afternoon light on the old town — somewhere near náměstí Svobody

images.alt: Underground cistern with rows of concrete columns lit by warm floor lights
images.caption: Beneath the city: Brno's underground reservoir, cathedral-like in its stillness
